title: Was JD Vance hesitant on Iran strike? Trump reveals VP’s stance
summary_full: President Trump stated Vice President Vance was "philosophically a little bit different" regarding the Iran war's outset, but insisted on no real disagreement over US airstrikes. Trump defended the strikes as necessary, downplaying any tension and emphasizing Vance's public support despite potential reservations.
